_meta.title: Medical Astrology — The Diagnostic Layer
_meta.subtitle: Planet → body system → endocrine → nervous system → root cause symptom map
_meta.purpose: This is the connective tissue of Astryx. It translates astrological data into clinical anatomy and plain-language symptom interpretation. Same birth data → same diagnostic output. The engine cross-references this file with cellSalts.json (sign-based mineral layer), sacredBotanicals.json (plant prescription), crystalsExpanded.json (mineral resonance), and sacredTones_nervousSystem.json (frequency intervention) to generate the complete five-sense protocol.
_meta.lineage: Synthesizes Hippocratic medical astrology, Nicholas Culpeper (1652), Cornell's Encyclopaedia of Medical Astrology (1933), Charles Carter, Donna Cunningham, Eileen Nauman, and modern psychosomatic medicine. Cross-validated with Carey's biochemic system.
_meta.principle: Every planet governs a specific anatomical territory, endocrine gland, and nervous-system pathway. When a natal planet is stressed (by aspect, transit, or progression) OR when a transiting planet activates a sensitive natal point, the symptom signature manifests in that territory. The root cause is never just 'astrological' — it is the planet's physiological correlate expressing dysregulation.
_meta.probabilisticFraming: All output must use 'may suggest', 'may indicate', 'may correlate with'. Never 'you have' or 'you are'. This is calibration, not prediction. Always recommend consultation with licensed healthcare providers for medical concerns.

plainLanguageBridge.whatItGoverns: Your central life force. Your heart, your spine, your sense of who you are. The part of you that says 'I am'.
plainLanguageBridge.whenItsBalanced: You feel radiant, centered, and seen. Your heart is steady. Your back is strong. People look to you.
plainLanguageBridge.whenItsOff: Your vitality dims. Your heart races or skips. You feel invisible or like an imposter. Your back hurts in the middle. You can't find the center of yourself.
plainLanguageBridge.howToRestore: Direct sunlight on bare skin. Heart-opening movement. Frankincense, rosemary, or orange essential oil. Red Lotus or rose tea. 126.22 Hz (Sun fork) to the heart center. Citrine or sunstone on the thymus.

plainLanguageBridge.whatItGoverns: Your power to transform. Your deepest survival programming. Your reproductive and eliminative organs. The cellular level of your body. The part of you that can die and be reborn.

rootCauseIndex._description: Reverse lookup — given a symptom or root cause, which planetary signatures may be involved. Used by the engine to combine user-reported symptom with their chart to generate a prescription. Always probabilistic.

type_breakdown.menstrual_irregularity: Moon afflicted, especially by outer planets

type_breakdown.IBS_anxiety_type: Mercury in Virgo or Mercury-Uranus with 6th house
type_breakdown.constipation_chronic: Saturn in earth signs or Saturn-Moon

type_breakdown.deep_transformation: Pluto contacts to Moon, Venus, or 5th

engineUsage._description: How the Astryx engine should use this file alongside the other data files to produce the unified 5-sense prescription.
engineUsage.step1_inputCollection: User reports: symptom OR feeling OR area of concern. Engine receives natal chart + current transits.
engineUsage.step2_diagnosticMatch: Engine looks up symptom in rootCauseIndex → returns candidate planetary signatures. Cross-references with user's natal chart and current transits → ranks signatures by activation.
engineUsage.step3_anatomyResolution: For top-ranked planetary signature, engine pulls anatomy block → body systems + organs + endocrine + nervous system pathway.
engineUsage.step4_plainLanguageBridge: Engine pulls plainLanguageBridge → presents 3 layers: what's happening cosmically, what it's doing in your body, what to do.
engineUsage.step5_protocolGeneration: Engine pulls crossReferences from this planet → links to: cellSalts.json (mineral via ruling sign), sacredBotanicals.json (plant ally), crystalsExpanded.json (mineral resonance), sacredTones_nervousSystem.json (frequency), scents.json (aroma), colors.json (visual), planets.json (taste/body movement). One unified prescription, five sensory channels.
engineUsage.step6_practitionerOverlay: In Practitioner mode, all three layers (cosmic + body + protocol) are visible with timing data (transit duration, intervention notes). In free user mode, only middle (body) and bottom (protocol) layers shown — cosmic mechanism is the optional 'See Why' reveal.
